4. Increased session TTL from 15 to 60 minutes.
5. Random logouts eliminated.

title: NFS mount failure (v3)
description: Production issue: In our staging environment, NFS shared storage mount failing on application servers after maintenance window.
resolution:
1. Checked NFS server status - service was stopped.
2. Restarted nfs-server service.
3. Verified exports file configuration.
4. Remounted on client servers.
5. Tested read/write operations successfully.

title: Monitoring alert storm (v3)
description: We're experiencing: In our staging environment, Nagios sending hundreds of duplicate alerts during partial outage.
resolution:
1. Identified cascading failure pattern.
2. Suppressed dependent service alerts.
3. Fixed root cause (failed switch).
4. Configured alert dependencies in Nagios.
5. Set up alert aggregation rules.

title: Suspicious login attempts
description: Multiple failed login attempts detected from unknown IP addresses on the admin portal.
resolution:
1. Identified source IPs from access logs.
2. Blocked IPs in WAF rules.
3. Enabled account lockout after 5 failed attempts.
4. Reset affected admin passwords.
5. Enabled MFA for all admin accounts.

title: Process hung consuming 100% CPU (v3)
description: Can someone look into this? In our staging environment, Java process hung at 100% CPU on production server.
resolution:
1. Captured thread dump with jstack.
2. Found infinite loop in background thread.
3. Killed process and restarted.
4. Code fix deployed to prevent recurrence.
5. CPU utilization normal.

title: GitHub Copilot license management (v6)
description: Please help - On the production server, Need to manage and track GitHub Copilot licenses across engineering teams.
resolution:
1. Audited current Copilot license usage.
2. Found 20 inactive licenses.
3. Reclaimed and reassigned to active developers.
4. Set up quarterly usage review.
5. Documented license management process.

title: WiFi access point overloaded (v6)
description: Please help - Conference room WiFi dropping connections during large meetings.
resolution:
1. Checked AP client count - 80 clients on single AP.
2. Added second AP with load balancing.
3. Configured band steering to 5GHz.
4. Adjusted channel width and power.
5. WiFi stable with 100+ clients.

title: InfluxDB disk usage spike (v2)
description: We're experiencing: In our staging environment, InfluxDB disk usage spiking due to uncompacted time series data.
resolution:
1. Checked shard groups and retention policies.
2. Found default retention set to infinite.
3. Created 90-day retention policy.
4. Ran COMPACT on existing shards.
5. Disk usage reduced by 60%.

title: Elasticsearch cluster red status
description: Elasticsearch cluster turned red - unassigned primary shards detected.
resolution:
1. Checked cluster health API.
2. Found primary shards unassigned after node crash.
3. Restored from latest snapshot.
4. Verified document count matches.
5. Cluster status back to green.
